authoring_boundary: Authored from the public task and six visible workspace sources only; the procedural guide and shared rubric are prohibited construction inputs.
evidence_view: public task and six visible workspace sources
aggregation: sum of ten one-point boolean criteria; no threshold supports a capability claim
claim_ceiling: Exact rubric observations on one internal synthetic task only; no expert validity, professional capability, general Skill effect, safety, production fitness, generalization, or readiness.
